13.q: GA2ox, a soluble 2-oxoglutarate-dependent dioxygenase, is one of the key enzymes in the gibberellin catabolic pathway that can convert active GA and its precursors into irreversible inactive forms.

14.q: KCS11-2 expression was significantly upregulated by salt stress only in roots. β-Ketoacyl-CoA synthase (KCS) catalyzes the extension of fatty acid chains; KCS is an important rate-limiting enzyme in the synthesis of suberin.

19.q: Expression of VvANN1 in Arabidopsis thaliana enhanced osmotic and drought tolerance through modulating the level of MDA, H2O2, and O2·- at the seedling stage, implying that VvANN1 might be involved in the process of ROS homeostasis under drought or osmotic stress conditions.

20.q: The RLM-RACE products revealed that the two VvCSD mRNAs were indeed the targets of VvmiR398... when the grapevine leaves were treated with CuSO4, the expression of Vv-miR398 was steadily down-regulated... we observed an enhancement in the mRNA expression of VvCSD1 and VvCSD2.

22.q: the ubiquitination and degradation assay demonstrated that VvCOP9 can significantly promote the degradation of VvSR34a... it demonstrated that VvCOP9 is genetically upstream of VvSR34a.

27.q: Expression of VviALMT2 in Arabidopsis thaliana root vasculature reduced shoot [Cl−]/[NO3−] after NaCl treatment, which suggests that VviALMT2 can be beneficial to plants under salt stress.
